sectionSummary: Start with opendevbrowser_prompting_guide or opendevbrowser_skill_load opendevbrowser-best-practices "quick start" before low-level browser commands.

skillDiscovery.aliasOnlyCycleNote: `research/` and `shopping/` remain packaged alias-only compatibility directories for one more cycle and stay non-discoverable until a verified migration lands.
skillDiscovery.shadowRiskSummary: A stale global Codex copy can shadow the bundled quick-start copy during ordinary skill discovery.
skillDiscovery.shadowRiskAction: Refresh or remove that global copy when validating bundled behavior.
